'''''Episode I: Queen Amidala''''' is a one-shot comic book which tells of a misadventure which [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] and [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] had on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in between scenes of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. The comic was written by [[Mark Schultz]], illustrated by [[Galen Showman]], and published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[July 28]], [[1999]]. In [[2015]], a digital edition of ''Episode I: Queen Amidala'' was released by [[Marvel Comics]] under the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] banner.

==Publisher's summary==
''Her world has been blockaded and her people imprisoned, but the Young Queen Amidala, so recently elected to the throne of Naboo, is a teenager of uncommon wisdom. Exiled from her home and spirited away by a pair of Jedi, Amidala will look upon every experience as a potential key to her world's problems. But her salvation may rest in the hands of another…perhaps where she least expects it!''<ref name="Dark Horse">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/98-332/Star-Wars-Episode-I---Queen-Amidala|text=Star Wars: Episode I - Queen Amidala}}</ref>
